Why can't people with braces manipulate gravity at will?  
To address this question, we need to consider the physical and structural limitations of braces.  
Braces are designed to correct misaligned teeth and improve oral health, but they do not provide any ability to manipulate gravity.  
The structure of a brace is purely mechanical and does not involve any magical or supernatural elements.
